text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What a racket.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Did you guys really enjoy the race that much?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Are they responding to me? Or are they
just carried away by their own excitement?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Damn! Did I really just lose?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It was a g—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Shut it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't go saying what a good match it was or
anything like that. And don't think this is it for
me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get stronger. Much stronger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how many times I have to challenge
you—I'll never give up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I believe you'll always keep getting
stronger and you'll always come back for another
fight.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's been quite the year. Challenging the Classic
Triple Crown, learning everyone's strengths, and
forging my own...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I wonder if next year will be like this too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I wouldn't mind that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I can't turn back now that I know how interesting
this can get. I want more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What kind of race should I run next year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll be her senior year. I'd like to see how the
Hanshin Daishoten goes first, then decide
whether to shoot for the prestigious spring Tenno
Sho.
choice_data_list: I was thinking the Hanshin Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Got it. I'll leave the rest to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just let me run more and more.
